name: Nodexo
notes: Provider entry for Nodexo Compute / SN106 (on-chain SubnetIdentitiesV3 netuid 106 = "Nodexo", nodexo.ai; previously mis-keyed to SN27, which on-chain is "Team TBC"). Official browser-facing website, docs, and console surfaces are tracked, but simple Node/HEAD probes currently receive connection resets and are not treated as healthy monitored endpoints.
